sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: HFND Stock Price | Unlimited HFND Multi-Strategy Return Tracker ETF
feed.summary: This article provides detailed information about the Unlimited HFND Multi-Strategy Return Tracker ETF (HFND), including its current stock price, trading exchange, and key financial metrics. It offers insights into the ETF's holdings, performance, expense ratio, dividend yield, and company profile. The article also includes technical analysis signals for HFND.

feed.title: Buffered Basket‑Linked Notes from GS Finance Corp. (NYSE: GS) due May 2028
feed.summary: GS Finance Corp. is offering buffered digital basket-linked notes due May 2028, guaranteed by The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. These notes do not pay interest and their return at maturity depends on the performance of a weighted basket of five international indices. Investors face potential losses if the final basket level falls more than 10% below the initial level, with amplified losses applying below the buffer level.

feed.title: GSK posts Q1 beat and reaffirms outlook (GSK:NYSE)
feed.summary: GSK reported better-than-expected financials for Q1 2026, driven by strong sales in its HIV and cancer medicine portfolios. These gains successfully counterbalanced a decline in sales from its general medicines, including respiratory therapies. The report indicates a solid start to the first full quarter under the new CEO, Luke Miels.

feed.title: Going Into Earnings, Is Albemarle Stock a Buy, a Sell, or Fairly Valued?
feed.summary: Morningstar assesses Albemarle (ALB) ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings report on May 6, considering it fairly valued with a 3-star rating and a $200 fair value estimate. Key watch points for the earnings include realized lithium prices, volume growth from new plants, and management's updated investment strategy following price increases. The company holds a narrow economic moat due to cost advantages in lithium and bromine production but faces high uncertainty from volatile lithium prices and political risks in Chile.

feed.title: State Street to Launch Tokenised Fund Servicing Capability From Luxembourg
feed.summary: State Street plans to launch a tokenized fund servicing capability from Luxembourg by the end of 2026, extending its existing fund administration, custody, and transfer agency services. This new service, delivered through the firm’s Digital Asset Platform, will support both traditional and digitally native fund structures under a unified operating model. Luxembourg was chosen for its established global funds ecosystem and supportive legal frameworks.

feed.title: For adults with rare autoimmune anemia, China fast-tracks HUTCHMED drug
feed.summary: HUTCHMED (Nasdaq/AIM: HCM; HKEX: 13) announced that its New Drug Application (NDA) for sovleplenib to treat adult warm antibody autoimmune hemolytic anemia (wAIHA) has been accepted for review by China's NMPA with Priority Review and Breakthrough Therapy Designation. This fast-tracking is based on positive Phase II/III ESLIM-02 study data, including a met primary endpoint in Phase III and significant overall response rates in Phase II. The company anticipates sovleplenib will address an unmet medical need for wAIHA patients and strengthen its hematology portfolio.

feed.title: Humana Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results; Affirms Full Year 2026 Adjusted Financial Guidance
feed.summary: Humana (NYSE: HUM) reported strong first-quarter 2026 financial results, with GAAP EPS of $9.83 and Adjusted EPS of $10.31, meeting the high end of their guidance. The company affirmed its full-year 2026 Adjusted EPS guidance of "at least $9.00" and announced continued growth in its individual Medicare Advantage and CenterWell segments. Humana also provided updates on executive leadership transitions within its Insurance segment.

feed.title: Data center demand helps Generac raise its 2026 sales outlook
feed.summary: Generac (NYSE: GNRC) reported strong Q1 2026 results, with net sales up 12% year-over-year to $1.06 billion and adjusted net income of $1.80 per share. The growth was primarily driven by a 28% increase in Commercial & Industrial (C&I) segment sales, boosted by demand from the data center market. Consequently, the company raised its full-year 2026 net sales growth guidance to the mid-to-high teens percent range and adjusted EBITDA margin expectations to 18.5-19.5%.

feed.title: CEOs of US’s top energy firms received average pay raise of $12.3m, review finds
feed.summary: A new review reveals that CEOs of the top US utility companies received an average pay raise of 16%, totaling $12.3 million last year, while consumers faced rising utility bills and service cut-offs. The report highlights that many executives received increased compensation despite failing to meet performance standards for reliability and customer satisfaction, with some compensation packages including luxury perks. Critics argue these pay increases are unjust, especially as companies prioritize shareholder profits over customer outcomes, leading to calls for stronger regulatory oversight.

feed.title: CoStar Group Reports Q1 2026 Revenue of $897 Million, Up 23% Year Over Year
feed.summary: CoStar Group announced its first-quarter 2026 revenue reached $897 million, marking a 23% increase year-over-year. The commercial real estate data and analytics firm also reported annualized net new bookings of $67 million, up 20% compared to the same period last year, indicating strong demand for its real estate information and digital marketplace products. This growth reflects the company's continued expansion across its platform portfolio and increased customer adoption in the real estate industry.

feed.title: Honda’s global vehicle output falls 5% in March
feed.summary: Honda Motor Company reported a 4.8% decline in global vehicle production in March 2026, totaling 313,259 units. While production in Japan saw a recovery with a 9% increase, overseas output fell by 8%. The company's global output for the full fiscal year (April 2025 to March 2026) also decreased by 7.3%.

feed.title: 5 Most Profitable Renewable Energy Stocks Right Now
feed.summary: This article identifies the 5 most profitable renewable energy stocks and delves into their financial performance and market standing. It specifically highlights WEC Energy Group, Inc. (NYSE:WEC), detailing its recent analyst upgrades and its strategic investments in renewable energy, aiming for net-carbon-neutral electric generation by 2050. The article is part of a larger discussion about the 11 most profitable companies in this sector.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Reduces Stock Position in Capital One Financial Corporation $COF
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly reduced its stake in Capital One Financial Corporation by 93.0% in Q4, selling 113,737 shares and retaining 8,496 shares. This reduction comes as Capital One missed Q1 earnings expectations and faces a $425 million settlement. Despite these challenges, analysts largely maintain positive ratings, with a consensus target price near $258.86 for the stock.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Increases Stock Position in Spire Inc. $SR
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly increased its stake in Spire Inc. (NYSE:SR) by 303% in the fourth quarter, now holding 21,144 shares valued at $1.749 million. This comes as Spire reported strong quarterly earnings, beating EPS estimates and showing a 13.9% year-over-year revenue increase, alongside providing positive guidance for fiscal years 2026 and 2027. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.825, representing an annualized yield of 3.6%, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $93.80.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Has $2.16 Million Stock Position in Ralliant Corporation $RAL
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly increased its stake in Ralliant Corporation (NYSE:RAL) by 464.6% in Q4, holding 42,359 shares valued at $2.16 million. Other institutional investors like Vanguard and Allspring Global Investments also boosted their positions, while company insiders acquired 8,145 shares in the last three months. Ralliant beat Q4 earnings estimates, provided optimistic FY 2026 guidance, and holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $50.50.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Raises Holdings in Pinterest, Inc. $PINS
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly increased its stake in Pinterest, Inc. (NYSE:PINS) by 501.1% in the fourth quarter, accumulating 85,740 shares valued at approximately $2.22 million. This move comes as Pinterest faces mixed analyst sentiment, with an average "Hold" rating and a target price of $25.43, amidst concerns over ad monetization and ongoing securities class-action lawsuits. Insider transactions also saw directors and insiders selling a notable number of shares in recent months.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Increases Stake in Turning Point Brands, Inc. $TPB
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly increased its stake in Turning Point Brands, Inc. (NYSE:TPB) by 712.5% in the fourth quarter, now owning 19,499 shares valued at approximately $2.11 million. This makes M&T Bank Corp a 0.10% owner of the company, which has an overall institutional ownership of about 96.1%. Despite this, some insider selling occurred, with CFO Andrew Flynn reducing his holding by 17.48% in March.

feed.title: Bank Of Montreal $BMO Stock Position Lowered by M&T Bank Corp
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly reduced its stake in Bank of Montreal (BMO) by 77.2% in the fourth quarter, selling 44,170 shares and retaining 13,019 shares valued at $1.69 million. Despite this, Bank of Montreal reported strong quarterly earnings, surpassing estimates with an EPS of $2.51 and revenue of $7.21 billion, and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.67 per share. Analyst sentiment for BMO remains moderately positive, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and a target price of $163.00, while institutional investors collectively own 45.82% of the stock.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Reduces Position in State Street Corporation $STT
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly reduced its stake in State Street Corporation (NYSE:STT) by 76.9% in the fourth quarter, selling 58,006 shares and retaining 17,468 shares valued at $2.25 million. Despite insider selling, State Street exceeded earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $2.84 against an estimated $2.64 and revenue of $3.80 billion, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $154.00. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.84, representing a 2.2% yield.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Has $1.69 Million Holdings in Monster Beverage Corporation $MNST
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly reduced its stake in Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ:MNST) by 48.0% in Q4, selling 20,310 shares and now possessing 22,044 shares valued at $1.69 million. Despite this reduction, Monster outperformed Q4 expectations with an EPS of $0.51 and revenue of $2.10 billion, showing a 17.6% year-over-year revenue increase. The company has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with an average target price of $84.55.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Has $2.27 Million Stock Holdings in Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. $MAA
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly increased its stake in Mid-America Apartment Communities by 554.9% in Q4, now holding 16,333 shares valued at $2.27 million. Despite missing Q4 earnings estimates, MAA provided FY2026 EPS guidance largely in line with analyst expectations and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.53, equating to a 4.7% annual yield. The article also details recent insider stock sales and various analyst rating changes and price target adjustments for MAA.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Sells 15,698 Shares of Alliant Energy Corporation $LNT
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly reduced its stake in Alliant Energy (NASDAQ:LNT) during the fourth quarter, selling 15,698 shares and now holding 34,078 shares valued at approximately $2.22 million. Alliant Energy recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.535 per share, with an ex-dividend date of April 30. The company has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $76.44.

feed.title: Amcor PLC $AMCR Stake Lessened by M&T Bank Corp
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp reduced its stake in Amcor PLC by 25.4% in the fourth quarter of 2025, selling 70,768 shares and retaining 207,653 shares valued at $1.73 million. While analysts have a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $50.89, Amcor's current dividend yield of 6.7% and a payout ratio of 169.93% raise questions about its sustainability. Amcor did, however, beat Q4 EPS estimates and provided positive FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Lowers Stake in Stryker Corporation $SYK
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly reduced its stake in Stryker Corporation (NYSE:SYK) by 84.5% in the fourth quarter, selling 36,239 shares and retaining 6,634 shares valued at $2.332 million. Concurrently, Stryker director Ronda E. Stryker sold 250,000 shares for $90.73 million, decreasing her ownership by 9.23%. Despite these sales, Stryker reported strong Q4 earnings, beating estimates with EPS of $4.47 and revenue of $7.17 billion, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.88 per share, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $421.11.

feed.title: The J. M. Smucker Company $SJM Shares Sold by M&T Bank Corp
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly reduced its stake in The J. M. Smucker Company (SJM) by 51.9% in Q4, selling over 25,000 shares. Despite this, other institutional investors increased their holdings, and the company reported strong Q4 earnings, beating EPS estimates and increasing revenue by 7% year-over-year. Smucker also announced a quarterly dividend of $1.10 per share.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Has $1.94 Million Holdings in Corteva, Inc. $CTVA
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly reduced its stake in Corteva, Inc. by 98.5% in Q4, selling 1,876,944 shares and maintaining holdings worth $1.94 million. Despite this, analyst sentiment leans towards a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus target price of $85.19, with some recent price target increases. Corteva's latest earnings met EPS expectations but missed revenue, and the company has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.18.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Decreases Holdings in Paychex, Inc. $PAYX
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly reduced its stake in Paychex, Inc. (NASDAQ:PAYX) by 83.6% in the fourth quarter, selling 93,661 shares and retaining 18,357 shares valued at $2.06 million. Despite institutional investor activity, analyst sentiment towards Paychex is largely mixed-to-negative, with several firms lowering price targets and MarketBeat's consensus rating being "Reduce" with a target price of $106.38. Paychex recently surpassed quarterly earnings estimates and authorized a $1.0 billion share buyback program.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Has $2.34 Million Stock Position in Enphase Energy, Inc. $ENPH
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly increased its stake in Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ:ENPH) by 319.6% in the fourth quarter, now holding 72,941 shares valued at approximately $2.34 million. Despite beating Q1 non-GAAP EPS estimates, Enphase's revenue decreased by about 20.6% year-over-year due to weaker U.S. demand and tariff pressures, leading to a GAAP loss. The company is, however, diversifying its business by developing an IQ® Solid-State Transformer for AI data centers.

feed.title: How Coca-Cola is winning in a K-shaped economy
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is successfully navigating a K-shaped economy by offering both premium and affordable products. The company reported strong Q1 net revenues up 12% and is focusing on smaller, more accessible product sizes like mini cans to cater to budget-conscious consumers, while continuing to expand its premium portfolio. This dual strategy, coupled with a robust operational playbook, has allowed Coca-Cola to exceed analyst expectations despite global economic uncertainties and inflation.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Reduces Stock Holdings in International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. $IFF
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly reduced its stake in International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (IFF) by 40.9% in the fourth quarter, selling over 20,000 shares. Despite this reduction by one institutional investor, other hedge funds adjusted their positions, mostly increasing their holdings. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus for IFF, with a target price of $87.50, and a company director recently made a substantial purchase of 142,000 shares.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Sells 16,716 Shares of Netflix, Inc. $NFLX
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly reduced its stake in Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ:NFLX) by selling 16,716 shares, a 48.7% cut, leaving them with 17,619 shares valued at $1.652 million. This move comes amid substantial insider selling from Netflix executives, including co-founder Reed Hastings and CFO Spencer Adam Neumann, who collectively sold shares worth over $136 million in the last 90 days. Despite the insider sales, Netflix reported strong Q1 results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, and holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $114.82.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Acquires 19,945 Shares of Oklo Inc. $OKLO
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp significantly increased its stake in Oklo Inc. (NYSE:OKLO) during the 4th quarter, acquiring an additional 19,945 shares, bringing its total holdings to 22,638 shares valued at approximately $1.625 million. Despite this institutional interest, Oklo, a pre-commercial nuclear microreactor company, remains unprofitable and has seen heavy insider selling, though Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $87.68. The company is experiencing increased market attention due to potential operational catalysts and collaborations tying it to AI and government energy initiatives.

feed.title: Bio-Techne (TECH) Expected to Announce Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: Bio-Techne (NASDAQ:TECH) is slated to release its Q3 2026 financial results before market open on Wednesday, May 6th, with analysts projecting earnings of $0.55 per share and revenues of $316.12 million. The biotechnology company exceeded expectations in the previous quarter, posting $0.46 EPS against an anticipated $0.43, and reported revenues of $295.88 million. Wall Street analysts currently hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for TECH, with an average price target of $72.77.

feed.title: Northern Trust Corporation (NASDAQ:NTRS) Receives Average Recommendation of "Hold" from Analysts
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corporation (NASDAQ:NTRS) has an average "Hold" recommendation from fourteen analysts, with two "sell," eight "hold," and four "buy" ratings. The average 12-month price objective for the stock is $163.5455. The company recently reported strong earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE:WY) Given Average Recommendation of "Hold" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE:WY) has received an average "Hold" rating from eleven brokerages, with an average one-year price target of $28.75. The company recently reported Q4 earnings, beating estimates by $0.04 EPS, though revenue missed expectations. Insider transactions show directors purchasing shares, and institutional investors have also significantly adjusted their stakes.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) Given Consensus Rating of "Moderate Buy" by Analysts
feed.summary: Analysts have given U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) a consensus rating of "Moderate Buy," with 14 buy, one strong buy, seven hold, and one sell recommendation. The average 12-month target price is $61.1750. The company recently reported Q1 earnings per share of $1.18, beating estimates, and revenue of $7.32 billion, also above expectations.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess McKesson (MCK) After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run
feed.summary: McKesson (MCK) has seen substantial share price growth over five years but has cooled recently. A Discounted Cash Flow analysis indicates the stock is 45.1% undervalued, with an estimated intrinsic value of $1,521.24 per share compared to its current price of around $835. The company's P/E ratio of 23.6x is below its derived Fair Ratio of 33.1x, further suggesting it may be undervalued.

feed.title: Southwest Fare Upgrades Gain Traction As Valuation Gap Draws Attention
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) reports that approximately 60% of customers are now opting for upgraded fare and product options, indicating success in its customer-focused transformation and revenue differentiation strategy. This development positions Southwest at an operational inflection point in its multi-year effort to boost revenue through product differentiation. While the stock currently trades below analyst targets and its estimated fair value, investors will be monitoring if this early traction leads to sustained customer loyalty and improved financial performance.

feed.title: Is Xcel Energy’s (XEL) Dam Safety Extension Quietly Reframing Its Regulated Risk Narrative?
feed.summary: Xcel Energy (XEL) recently received an extension from FERC until December 31, 2026, to address seismic safety comments for its Cabin Creek dams, highlighting ongoing regulatory scrutiny. This procedural extension occurs as expectations build for Xcel's first-quarter 2026 earnings, influenced by anticipated higher electric and natural gas demand. The company's investment narrative is centered on regulated utility growth, capital projects, and managing regulatory and wildfire risks, with projected revenues of $18.7 billion and earnings of $3.3 billion by 2029.

feed.title: Pentair (NYSE:PNR) Hits New 12-Month Low - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Pentair (NYSE:PNR) recently hit a new 52-week low after reporting Q1 earnings that beat expectations but issued weaker Q2 revenue guidance, signaling slower near-term demand, particularly in U.S. residential markets. Analyst price targets have been cut, and the company also announced a dividend. Insider selling and institutional investment adjustments were also noted.

feed.title: Blackstone Inc. $BX Shares Purchased by First Fiduciary Investment Counsel Inc.
feed.summary: First Fiduciary Investment Counsel Inc. significantly increased its stake in Blackstone Inc. (NYSE:BX) by 44.5%, now holding 66,582 shares valued at $10.26 million. The investment firm now has Blackstone as its 23rd largest holding, representing 2.0% of its portfolio. Additionally, insider activity showed major shareholder Holdings IV GP Mana Blackstone bought over 2.8 million shares, increasing ownership by 18.2%, while another major shareholder, Bx Buzz Ml-1 Gp LLC, sold over 7.4 million shares, reducing its stake by 99.66%. The company reported a slight beat on quarterly earnings and revenue and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.16.

feed.title: Apple Inc. $AAPL is Roffman Miller Associates Inc. PA's 3rd Largest Position
feed.summary: Roffman Miller Associates Inc. PA recently reduced its stake in Apple Inc. ($AAPL) by 0.7%, though Apple still constitutes 6.7% of their portfolio, making it their third-largest holding with a value of over $121 million. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions in Apple, which currently trades at $270.71 and has a market capitalization of $3.97 trillion. Analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock, with a consensus target price of $301.83, despite some insider selling and concerns about Apple's position in the AI race.

feed.title: Bogart Wealth LLC Acquires 26,421 Shares of Autodesk, Inc. $ADSK
feed.summary: Bogart Wealth LLC significantly increased its stake in Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADSK) during the fourth quarter, boosting its holdings by over 27,000% to 26,517 shares, valued at approximately $7.85 million. This increase comes as Autodesk reported strong Q4 results, surpassing analyst estimates for both EPS and revenue, and provided positive FY2027 guidance. Despite recent price objective trims from some analysts, the stock maintains a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $335.93.

feed.title: Sage Mountain Advisors LLC Has $17.87 Million Stock Position in Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL
feed.summary: Sage Mountain Advisors LLC reduced its holdings in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) by 5.6% in the fourth quarter, now owning 57,101 shares valued at $17.87 million. The stock represents 0.9% of the firm's investment portfolio. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $369.67 for Alphabet.

feed.title: Sunpointe LLC Increases Stake in Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL
feed.summary: Sunpointe LLC has increased its holdings in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) by 20.8% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total to 16,239 shares valued at $5,083,000. This makes Alphabet its 14th largest holding, comprising 1.7% of its portfolio. Several other institutional investors have also adjusted their stakes in Alphabet, and the article provides a summary of recent news impacting the company, including positive developments in AI and cloud services, as well as neutral and negative sentiments regarding earnings, valuation, and regulatory risks.

feed.title: ResMed (NYSE:RMD) Sets New 1-Year Low - What's Next?
feed.summary: ResMed (NYSE:RMD) recently hit a new 52-week low, trading at $215.30 before closing at $217.2260. Despite this, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $294.55. The company reported strong Q3 earnings, beating estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend, though recent insider sales have also occurred.

feed.title: Citizens cuts CoStar Group stock price target on Homes.com concerns
feed.summary: Citizens has lowered its price target for CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) shares from $73.00 to $44.00, while maintaining a Market Outperform rating, due to concerns about the Homes.com business unit. The firm anticipates CoStar will reduce its investment in Homes.com, aiming to meet its 2028 and 2030 financial targets. Despite potential challenges for the remainder of 2026, Citizens views CoStar's business excluding Homes.com as high quality and expects profitability to improve.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley raises Seagate stock price target on pricing power
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) to $767 from $582, maintaining an Overweight rating, due to the company's stronger-than-expected pricing power, gross margins, and earnings potential fueled by accelerating data growth and AI applications. This upgrade is based on hard disk drives continuing to capture a significant portion of cloud storage demand and a disciplined supply environment. Mizuho also raised its price target for Seagate to $700 following the company's impressive fiscal third-quarter 2026 financial results, which surpassed analyst expectations.

feed.title: Nucor Steel West Virginia mill 85% complete, on schedule for 2027 production
feed.summary: Nucor Steel West Virginia's $4 billion mill in Mason County is 85% complete and on schedule to begin testing production equipment, with full production expected by the end of 2028. The mill will produce advanced sheet steel for the automotive and consumer durable markets, helping Nucor grow its market share in the Midwest and Northeast. The facility, which is Nucor's largest, will employ over 800 workers and utilize electric arc furnaces to recycle scrap metal into new steel.

feed.title: Wells Fargo’s Long-Anticipated Wall Street Expansion Is Here
feed.summary: Wells Fargo is significantly expanding its Wall Street trading business after being freed from a Federal Reserve-imposed asset cap. The bank joined peers above the $2 trillion asset mark and saw a more than 40% increase in trading-related assets in the first quarter year-over-year, signaling its strategic investment in this sector.
